subject: feat(data): add batch preamble and rename playbook to DATA_OPERATIONS
body:
Create config/batch-preamble.md with analysis instructions that get
embedded in every batch by pending.js. This ensures the AI always reads
tagging guidelines, scoring rubrics, and rules with each batch file.

Rename EXTRACTION_PLAYBOOK.md to DATA_OPERATIONS.md, trimming duplicated
content that now lives in the preamble. All analysis fields (risk, debt,
epic, semver) are now required — no blank fields allowed.

Tags: feature, refactor, docs
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: data-pipeline
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JoUyjBGVsqp2yuJCF4haJc
title: add batch preamble and rename playbook to DATA_OPERATIONS
